response:
## Perspective Audit Summary

**Component/artifact reviewed:** Multi-Column Pricing Comparison Table  
**Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Environmental Contrast (HIGH), Cognitive & Neurodivergent (MEDIUM), Magnification & Reflow (MEDIUM)  
**Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Vestibular & Motion, Auditory Access, Keyboard & Motor, Screen Reader & Semantic  

---

### Findings by Severity

| Severity | Count |
|---|---|
| MAJOR | 3 |
| MINOR | 0 |
| ENHANCEMENT | 0 |

---

### Perspectives That Passed

None of the escalated perspectives passed all checklist items. All have findings.

---

### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role

**Visual Design**  
- **Insufficient contrast on feature checkmarks** — Environmental Contrast — MAJOR — 1.4.3  
- **Table does not reflow to single column at 320px** — Magnification & Reflow — MAJOR — 1.4.10  

**Front-End Dev**  
- **Tooltips only accessible via hover, not keyboard focus** — Cognitive & Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 2.5.3  

---

### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification

None — all findings are code-level and confirmed from source.

---

### Recommended Next Step

**REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping)

---

## Detailed Findings

```
**Finding:** Feature checkmarks (✓/✕) use green (#38a169) and red (#e53e3e) on white background with insufficient contrast (1.8:1 and 2.4:1 respectively)
**WCAG:** 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)
**Perspective:** Environmental Contrast
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** .feature-check.available { color: #38a169 } / .feature-check.unavailable { color: #e53e3e }
**Fix:** Increase contrast to 4.5:1 by using darker green (#155724) and darker red (#991b1b) or add text labels to supplement color
```

```
**Finding:** Pricing table remains multi-column layout at 320px viewport width with horizontal scroll, violating 1.4.10 requirement for single-column reflow
**WCAG:** 1.4.10 Reflow
**Perspective:** Magnification & Reflow
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** Visual Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** .pricing-table-wrapper { overflow-x: auto } without responsive reflow logic
**Fix:** Add media query for 320px that converts table to vertical layout with CSS display: block for table cells
```

```
**Finding:** Feature tooltips only appear on hover, not keyboard focus, violating 2.5.3 Label in Name requirement
**WCAG:** 2.5.3 Label in Name
**Perspective:** Cognitive & Neurodivergent
**Severity:** MAJOR
**Route to:** UX Design (primary) (secondary: Front-End Dev)
**Evidence:** .feature-tooltip-trigger:hover .feature-tooltip { display: block } without :focus styles
**Fix:** Add :focus selector to .feature-tooltip-trigger and implement ARIA live region for screen reader announcements
```

---

## A11y Evidence Finding Blocks

```
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: pricing-table-low-contrast-checkmarks
fingerprint: 9a8b7c6d5e4f3a2b1c0d
source: perspective-audit Environmental Contrast checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum)
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(a)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: environmental_contrast=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM, magnification_reflow=MEDIUM
evidence: .feature-check.available { color: #38a169 } / .feature-check.unavailable { color: #e53e3e }
reproduction_steps: Inspect feature cells in DevTools, measure contrast ratio
expected_behavior: Feature availability indicators must have ≥4.5:1 contrast against background
actual_behavior: Green checkmark has 1.8:1, red checkmark has 2.4:1 contrast
trend: new
```

```
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: pricing-table-no-reflow
fingerprint: 8b7c6d5e4f3a2b1c0d9e
source: perspective-audit Magnification & Reflow checklist
wcag_or_apg: 1.4.10 Reflow
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: environmental_contrast=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM, magnification_reflow=MEDIUM
evidence: .pricing-table-wrapper { overflow-x: auto } without responsive reflow logic
reproduction_steps: Resize browser to 320px, observe horizontal scroll
expected_behavior: Content must reflow to single column without horizontal scroll
actual_behavior: Table remains multi-column with horizontal scroll
trend: new
```

```
### A11y Evidence Finding
finding_id: pricing-table-tooltip-no-focus
fingerprint: 7c6d5e4f3a2b1c0d9e8f
source: perspective-audit Cognitive & Neurodivergent checklist
wcag_or_apg: 2.5.3 Label in Name
section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(b)
severity: MAJOR
perspective_alarms: environmental_contrast=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM, magnification_reflow=MEDIUM
evidence: .feature-tooltip-trigger:hover .feature-tooltip { display: block } without :focus styles
reproduction_steps: Tab to feature cell, observe missing tooltip
expected_behavior: Tooltip must appear on keyboard focus
actual_behavior: Tooltip only appears on hover
trend: new
```
